title: (Bullish Signal) RH, MACD Histogram just turned positive
author: tickeron_community
selftext:
This is a Bullish indicator signaling RH's price could rise from here. Traders may explore going long the stock or buying call options. Tickeron A.I. dvisor identified 46 similar cases where RH's MACD histogram became positive, and 36 of them led to successful outcomes. Odds of Success: 78%. Current price $393.37 is above $379.57 the highest resistance line found by Tickeron A.I. Throughout the month of 10/06/20 - 11/05/20, the price experienced a +8% Uptrend. During the week of 10/29/20 - 11/05/20, the stock enjoyed a +11% Uptrend growth.

https://preview.redd.it/muownmly2ox51.png?width=1533&format=png&auto=webp&s=53a7be721060dfb3e5b1c87062b44c70a8edcbd6

**Bullish Trend Analysis**

The Stochastic Indicator suggests the stock price trend may be in a reversal from a downward trend to an upward trend. Tickeron A.I. detected that in 35 of 47 cases where RH's Stochastic Oscillator exited the oversold zone resulted in an increase in price. Tickeron's analysis proposes that the odds of a continued upward trend are 74%.

The Momentum Indicator moved above the 0 level on November 04, 2020. You may want to consider a long position or call options on RH as a result. Tickeron A.I. detected that in 63 of 75 past instances where the momentum indicator moved above 0, the stock continued to climb. The odds of a continued upward trend are 84%.

The Moving Average Convergence Divergence (MACD) for RH just turned positive on November 05, 2020. Looking at past instances where RH's MACD turned positive, the stock continued to rise, Tickeron A.I. shows that in 36 of 46 cases over the following month. The odds of a continued upward trend are 78%.

Following a +8.26% 3-day Advance, the price is estimated to grow further. Considering data from situations where RH advanced for three days, in 269 of 323 cases, the price rose further within the following month. The odds of a continued upward trend are 83%.

RH may jump back above the lower band and head toward the middle band. Traders may consider buying the stock or exploring call options.

The Aroon Indicator entered an Uptrend today. Tickeron A.I. detected that in 265 of 334 cases where RH Aroon's Indicator entered an Uptrend, the price rose further within the following month. The odds of a continued Uptrend are 79%.
